examples: The vitriol he hurled at members of the press knew no bounds.
He formerly led Breitbart News, a website that has printed white nationalist and anti-Semitic vitriol.
The Japanese seemed taken back by the vitriol of the Europeans.
For a nation potentially weary of constant vitriol between the candidates, this may have played well.
On the other hand, a lot of the vitriol directed against this package is also misplaced.
